name: LimeLeads
highlight_text: Best suited for: US-based B2B lead generation
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What LimeLeads Does

LimeLeads keeps its focus tight: high-quality U.S. B2B contacts. For agencies doing broad outbound outreach, this accuracy helps eliminate bad emails and pointless dials. While it won’t give you SMB digital performance insights, its reliable verification system remains a big draw for teams that want consistently clean, usable lists.

Source: Limeleads

Key Features 

  • Real-time verification technology across multiple sources, maintaining 99% email accuracy and current phone numbers
  • Weekly database refreshes to maintain accuracy and remove outdated information
  • Provides direct dial numbers, mobile numbers, and verified email addresses for multiple contact options
  • Advanced filtering system for lead lists using specific criteria like location and company size, focused on US-based businesses
  • Multi-level verification that combines third-party services, APIs, and human verification 

Benefits of Limeleads

  • High email accuracy rate and verified phone numbers ensure reliable contact data
  • Weekly database updates maintain data freshness and prevent outdated contact usage
  • Payment model based only on verified contacts, reducing spending on unusable data
  • Access to various contact options, including direct dials and mobile numbers, enables diverse outreach approaches
  • Specialized data collection for US-based businesses with detailed filtering capabilities

Pricing

  • Pro: $99 per month
  • Business: $150 per month
  • Enterprise: $400 per month

You can avail discounted pricing by choosing to bill annually.

Pros

✅ Strong focus on US-based, local leads and mobile dials

✅ High data accuracy with 99% email verification

✅ Pay-for-verified model

Cons

🚫 Less focus on international or B2B enterprise data

🚫 Quite expensive for the limited data points provided on SMB prospects

🚫 Lacks the comprehensive digital performance audit features of other tools

‍
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Customers Say

“Limeleads is the most crucial tool that helps source data for email campaigns reach out. A user-friendly tool with clear UI/UX helps create a list and pull leads easily…Limeleads is a little bit costlier than the other tools in the market. Data availability for specific regions like SEA, MEA, and Latam is very low. Need to improve the accuracy level of email as well.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com
summing_up_description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

Summing Up…

When you explore Buzzboard alternatives, focus on tools that offer reliable accuracy, fair pricing, and insights your team can actually use during outreach. Agencies that work with SMBs need platforms that reveal real digital gaps instead of handing over generic contact lists that lead nowhere.

Enterprise B2B databases often miss the signals that matter for local businesses, so they rarely help you find prospects who clearly need your services. A strong SMB-focused tool will highlight where a business is struggling online, how big the opportunity is, and whether they’re a good fit for your agency.

Choosing a platform with this level of clarity helps your team book more conversations, guide better pitches, and build a healthier, more predictable pipeline. If your agency thrives on identifying high-intent local leads, invest in a solution designed to surface exactly that.

‍

Get Started with Synup

Synup is a complete client acquisition engine that shows you exactly which businesses need help and gives you the audit proof and pitch angles to close them. For agencies that grow by adding multiple client locations each month, Synup OS can become a critical part of the workflow. 

Start with a demo. 

‍

FAQs

1. What's the best Buzzboard alternative for deep, local digital audits?

For true local digital audits, Synup is the strongest option because it analyzes SEO gaps, reviews, listing accuracy, and missing tech tools that SMB agencies rely on. If you only need broad local business data at scale, Openmart is a lighter alternative that pulls basic information.

​2. Which is the better alternative to Buzzboard for sales teams?

ZoomInfo is better for enterprise B2B sales (best data accuracy, highest cost). Apollo is better for mid-market/startup sales teams needing an affordable all-in-one data and email sequencing solution. Synup is the best for SMBs trying to scale with fewer tools. 

3. Why is pricing so important when choosing an SMB prospecting tool?

Agencies selling $100 to $200 monthly services need a low cost per lead to stay profitable. Tools designed for high-value enterprise deals (like ZoomInfo) often have prohibitive annual contracts and high credit costs, making them unviable for the high-volume, lower-value transactions typical of the SMB market.

‍
